hero_subtitle: Full-stack web developer, specialized in C#/.NET
hero_text1: For years, I worked in sales management, eyes buried in numbers, spreadsheets and forecasts. I loved the analysis and I adored finding solutions to my clients' problems, but over time, one thing was missing: the feeling of actually building something. One day, I realized that I needed a job where I could see the tangible result of my efforts, a bit like a mason who sees his wall rise brick by brick. That's what led me to web development.
hero_text2:
The front-end immediately seduced me: starting from a blank page, imagining, shaping, seeing a project come to life before my eyes. Then I discovered the back-end, and I loved this methodical, almost artisanal progression where every little step contributes to a complex and coherent functionality. Today, I fully realize myself in this profession where logic, creativity and construction meet.

After completing an online training, I obtained my professional title of Concepteur‑Developer of digital solutions in December 2025. I am now looking for a junior developer position or an apprenticeship in order to continue to develop my skills and contribute to exciting projects.
presentation_text1:
Hello, I'm Corinne VITALI, a web developer in career transition.

I worked for several years in sales management. I loved finding solutions to customers' problems, but I missed the satisfaction of building something tangible.
Web development then became an obvious choice: a profession where logic, creativity and attention to detail come together.
presentation_text2:
The front-end immediately seduced me with its visual dimension and the possibility of creating from a blank page.
As for the back-end, I appreciate this methodical progression where each step contributes to a coherent and complete functionality.

Trained online, I obtained my professional title of Concepteur‑Developer of digital solutions in 2025. Today, I am looking for a junior developer position to continue progressing and contribute to concrete projects.
presentation_text3: My experience in customer relations allows me to analyze needs, clarify expectations and facilitate exchanges between teams, in order to design intuitive and user-centered interfaces.
sectionProjects_text: Here are some of the projects I’ve worked on during and after my training :
sectionProjects_listem1: Project 1: An online ticketing system for the Paris 2024 Olympic Games, developed in Asp.NET Core. I designed the user interface and implemented the booking and payment features.
sectionProjects_listem2: Project 2: A showcase website for a gymnastics teacher, built in Asp.NET Core. I created a responsive and dynamic interface to present the teacher's services and schedule.
sectionProjects_listem3: Project 3: An interactive Advent calendar, developed in vanilla JavaScript. I designed a playful interface for my daughter.
sectionContact_subtitle: Thank you for taking the time to visit my website !
sectionContact_text: Feel free to contact me by email or via LinkedIn for any questions or collaboration opportunities. </br> I would be happy to talk with you !
